Not attempted

Flywheels are fitted for single cylinder and multicylinder engine of the same rating. Which of the following statement is true?

Correct answer: B
Solution

These will be less variation of turning moment in the multi-cylinder engine as compared to that for single cylinder engine.

Q7 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Two shafts have their axes parallel and 2.5 cm apart. One of the shaft drives the other through an Oldham’s coupling. If the speed of the shaft is 100 rpm. The maximum velocity of sliding of the intermediate disc on either of the side discs is ______ cm/min. [Rounded off to nearest integer]

NAT
Correct answer: 1571
Solution

1571 (1565 - 1575)

 
Q8 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A ship has a rotor of mass 3000 kg rotating at 2500 rpm and its radius of gyration is 30 cm. If the rotation of the rotor is clockwise looking from the stern, then the gyroscopic couple when ship rolls due to wave with a velocity 0.1 rad/s is ______ kN-m. [Rounded off to nearest integer]

NAT
Correct answer: 0
Solution

0 (0 - 0)
As no precession takes place, therefore the gyroscopic couple is zero.

Q10 Not checked

In a four bar mechanism, the length of driver crank, coupler and follower link are 150 mm, 250 mm and 300 mm respectively. If the fixed link length is L0, then the range of values for L0, so as to make it a crank-rocker mechanism is

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)

 
 
Q11 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Which of the following is not an exact-straight line mechanism?

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
Exact straight line mechanisms:
Paucellier mechanism, Hart mechanism, Scott-Russel mechanism, Kempe mechanism.
Approximate straight line mechanisms:
Modified-Scott-Russel mechanism, Grashopper mechanism, Watt mechanism, Tchebicheff
mechanism, Robert mechanism, etc.

Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

As the configuration diagram of scotch yoke mechanism is shown, at the instant the crank OP has an angular velocity of 10 rad/s and an angular acceleration of 30 rad/s2. then the absolute acceleration of slider ‘P’ with respect to fixed point ‘O’ is _________ m/s2.
[Round of the two decimal places].

 
NAT
Correct answer: 20.88
Solution

20.88  (20.78 - 20.98)

 
Q13 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A cast iron flywheel is required to absorb 25000 Nm of energy as speed is increased from 120 to 125 rpm. If the wheel is to be solid disc having a diameter 8 times its thickness and density of C.I. is 7200 kg/m3, then the diameter of the flywheel is _____ m.

[Correct upto two decimal places]

NAT
Correct answer: 2.12
Solution

2.12 (2.00 - 2.20)

NAT
Correct answer: 116
Solution

116 (115 - 117)

NAT
Correct answer: 39.27
Solution

39.27 (39.00 - 39.80)

NAT
Correct answer: 39
Solution

39 (38 - 40)

NAT
Correct answer: 185
Solution

185 (180 - 190)

Q26 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following statements is/are correct?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, b, d)
The plane motion of a rigid body relative to another rigid body is equivalent to the rolling
motion of one centrode on the other.

Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0

A horizontal steam engine running at 180 rpm has a bore of 320 mm and stroke 560 mm. The connecting rod is 1 m long and the mass of the reciprocating parts is 50 kg. When the crank is 50° past inner dead centre, the steam pressure on the cover side of the piston is 1.2 MPa, while that on the crank side is 0.15 MPa. Neglecting the area of the piston rod. The turning moment on the crankshaft is _____ kNm. (Correct upto three decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 20.625
Solution

20.625 (20.00 - 21.00)

(Rounded off to 2 decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 1.93
Solution

1.93 (1.80 - 2.20)
